prestazioni: Upgrade the B58B30M0 (3.0L inline-6) with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (80mm compressor wheel, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom Alpina-specific turbo manifold by Gintani for optimized exhaust flow and reduced lag, targeting 650whp on E85 with a supporting fuel system upgrade including dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors

Install a CSF Racing B58-specific aluminum radiator with integrated oil cooler and a PWR Performance intercooler (5.5" thick core, 100% aluminum construction) to maintain consistent intake temps under sustained boost, paired with a custom 3.5" titanium downpipe by Evolution Racewerks with a secondary catalytic converter delete for improved spool and flow

Replace the factory ZF 8HP75 transmission with a ZF 8HP76X (Alpina-tuned) unit, reinforced with a Level 10 Motorsports transmission brace and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 dual-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic friction material) for 800+ lb-ft torque capacity, paired with a differential cooler by Setrab and a 3.55:1 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration
estetica: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit by AC Schnitzer (ACS5 Sport) with integrated front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, designed specifically for the B4 chassis to accommodate the wider track and aggressive stance, finished in a custom matte BMW Individual Frozen Grey paint

Replace the factory wheels with a set of Alpina Dynamic 21" forged alloy wheels (Style IV, 9.5J front / 11J rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R21 front, 305/25 R21 rear) for maximum grip, paired with a KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (3-way adjustable, 80mm of travel) for precise ride height and damping control

Add a custom Alpina-inspired front grille with a 3D-printed carbon fiber mesh insert (replacing the kidney grilles) and a rear spoiler by Vorsteiner (V-FF102, carbon fiber) with an integrated Gurney flap for improved downforce, complemented by a full LED lighting upgrade including LUX V3 Angel Eyes and a custom rear light delete with sequential LED taillights by iND
